SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.util

Class DerParser

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.util.DerParser
public class DerParser extends Object
Lightweight ASN.1 DER parser to replace Bouncy Castle dependencies. Supports parsing common DER structures used in X.509 certificates.
Author:
Milton Smith

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    DerParser.DerValue
    Represents a parsed DER value with its tag and content.

  • Method Details

    • parse

      public static DerParser.DerValue parse(byte[] data) throws IOException
      Parse DER-encoded data from a byte array.
      Parameters:
      data - The DER-encoded byte array
      Returns:
      A DerValue representing the parsed data
      Throws:
      IOException - If parsing fails

    • parse

      public static DerParser.DerValue parse(InputStream is) throws IOException
      Parse DER-encoded data from an input stream.
      Parameters:
      is - The input stream containing DER-encoded data
      Returns:
      A DerValue representing the parsed data
      Throws:
      IOException - If parsing fails

    • parseAll

      public static List<DerParser.DerValue> parseAll(byte[] data) throws IOException
      Parse all DER values from a byte array (for sequences with multiple elements).
      Parameters:
      data - The DER-encoded byte array
      Returns:
      List of DerValues
      Throws:
      IOException - If parsing fails

    • encodeOid

      public static byte[] encodeOid(String oid)
      Encode an OID string to DER bytes.

    • toHex

      public static String toHex(byte[] data)
      Convert a byte array to a hex string.
